role: This file is the React application entry point that mounts the root component into the DOM.
capabilities: Bootstraps the React application with createRoot
Eagerly imports global stylesheets (tokens/paper.css, surface.css, rhm/rhm.css)
Validates that the #root DOM element exists and fails loudly if missing
substance_why: It performs complete, real bootstrap work: DOM container validation, stylesheet loading, and React root rendering.
interactions_missing: No loading or splash state during bootstrap
No lazy/code-split loading of the root component
No runtime environment or feature checks
performance_risks: Global CSS imports are eager and may block first render
<App /> is synchronously imported, preventing code-splitting of the root route
Initial render starts immediately with no deferred or progressive loading strategy
reuse_why: The file contains standard, minimal React bootstrap logic that remains valid and should be preserved in the redesign.
decomposition_hints: Move global CSS imports into a dedicated theme/style provider or lazy-loaded layer
Wrap <App /> in a Suspense boundary and lazy-load it for code splitting
Extract root-element validation into a small setup/util module if reused elsewhere
